title: helianthemum oelandicum subsp. incanum
intro: Helianthemum oelandicum subsp. incanum, also known as rockrose or mountain rose, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Cistaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helianthemum oelandicum subsp. incanum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and even exhibit anticancer properties. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the flowers and leaves in hot water or a solvent, and are often used to alleviate various health issues.
